name: Crab Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat one tablespoon of butter over medium heat. Add onion, celery, and garlic to the skillet. Cook for about three minutes or until the vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
2. Remove the skillet from the heat source. Stir in the crabmeat, three-quarters cup of bread crumbs, mayonnaise, egg, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, and pepper until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into four patties. Lightly coat each patty with the remaining one-quarter cup of breadcrumbs by pressing them onto each side.
4. In the same large skillet over medium heat, melt the remaining four tablespoons of butter. Cook the patties for eight to nine minutes or until they are golden brown on both sides.
